notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Yorke to second baseman Nick Gonzales to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. Nico Hoerner out at 2nd. Alex Bregman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pete Crow-Armstrong GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Crow-Armstrong grounds into a double play, first baseman Ryan O'Hearn to shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. Seiya Suzuki out at 2nd. Pete Crow-Armstrong out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw flies out to right fielder Billy Cook.

notableEvents.label: Nick Yorke GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Yorke grounds into a double play, second baseman Nico Hoerner to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Joey Bart out at 2nd. Nick Yorke out at 1st.
